title: mangifera austroindica
intro: Mangifera austroindica, also known as the Indian mango, is a plant species native to India and Southeast Asia, characterized by its evergreen leaves and small, yellowish flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mangifera austroindica include reducing inflammation and fighting infections, as well as potentially lowering cholesterol and blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as extracts and infusions, are used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
